name: Full-Text Search with Meilisearch
description: Add Meilisearch for lightning-fast, typo-tolerant full-text search. Index your database records, configure searchable/filterable attributes, and build a search UI with InstantSearch React components.

steps.description: Install Meilisearch client and React InstantSearch
Create Meilisearch client, createIndex(), indexDocuments(), and search() helper
Create indexing script that fetches records from DB and sends to Meilisearch
Create search UI with InstantSearch, hits, pagination, and facet filters
Create server-side search proxy with authentication and result shaping

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Instant search with typo tolerance in <50ms — self-hosted or cloud
